name: Siemens NX
description: An integrated CAD, CAM, and CAE platform used for aerospace design, manufacturing preparation, and digital-thread workflows.
whyUseIt: NX is powerful where geometry, analysis preparation, and manufacturing handoff need to stay tightly linked. It is especially useful in organisations building a digital pipeline from design through production.
fieldPosition: Detailed design, production preparation, and digital manufacturing integration
engineerWorkflow: Refine geometry, define assemblies, prepare manufacturing data, and connect design changes to downstream tooling or production decisions.
managerExpects: A controlled digital thread from released geometry into manufacturing and support artefacts.
demoDescription: Model a simplified structural assembly and map how a geometry change would affect production tooling or process steps.
beginnerMistakes: Optimising the model for CAD elegance instead of downstream use
Ignoring how geometry decisions affect tooling or assembly sequence
